---
title: "About"
image: images/profile.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/assigajoseph
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josephassiga/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/josephassiga

---

## About this blog

I write technical deep dives, architecture explorations, and honest product evaluations. Posts aim to go beyond tutorials: they explain why systems behave the way they do and when to choose one approach over another.

## About me

Hi — I'm Joseph. I work with cloud platforms, distributed systems, and developer tools. I like explaining trade-offs, drawing architecture diagrams, and testing ideas with small prototypes.

## Connect

Find me on the links above. If you'd like to collaborate or share feedback, reach out on Twitter or GitHub.
